modules.name: DroneCore
modules.description: Two-voice detuned oscillator for dense harmonic drones.

modules.name: DroneClone
modules.description: 8-voice amplified string wall. Mass, tension, jawari buzz, choke collapse. V/OCT + feedback loop. Amplified Futures flagship.

modules.name: Send
modules.description: 2×2 cross-send feedback routing matrix. A→B send, B→A return, A→C/C→A internal feedback bus. Polyphonic.

modules.name: Choke
modules.description: 4-channel cheap-mixer-as-instrument. GAIN, TONE, MUTE per channel. Fixed auto-pan. MAIN + stereo L/R out with soft saturation.

modules.name: Pulse
modules.description: 16-step no-wave step percussion. 4×4 trigger grid, HIT/DECAY/METAL/CRACK. TRG clock in, audio out.

modules.name: Drift
modules.description: Slow random modulation source. RATE/WANDER/SLEW with CV. SMOOTH, STEP, and GATE outputs. SYNC trigger. V/OCT thru.

modules.name: Harmonic Pressure
modules.description: Harmonic series pitch CV generator. PITCH root + SPREAD ensemble detuning. PARTIAL selects first partial, COUNT sets how many. JUST/EQUAL/MICRO tuning modes. Outputs polyphonic V/oct for String Mass Core.

modules.name: String Mass Core
modules.description: 16-voice harmonic mass oscillator. MASS voice count, SPREAD detune, TIMBRE harmonic content. UNIS/HARM/JUST/MICRO modes. HARM mode uses Branca odd-harmonic sections. 1/√N amplitude normalised. Polyphonic.

modules.name: Collapse Saturator
modules.description: Stereo drive/saturation with collapse. DRIVE pre-gain, BUZZ character (ODD/EVEN/FULL), COLLAPSE gate maxes drive instantly, RECOVERY sets return time. Sidechain input. V/oct thru.

modules.name: Feedback Governor
modules.description: Controlled feedback send/return. AMOUNT level, TONE LP filter, DECAY attenuates per pass. KILL button/gate. DC blocker + ±10V safety limiter. V/oct thru.

modules.name: Wall Conductor
modules.description: Section-based performance mixer/conductor. DENSITY sweeps 4 channels in. PRESSURE saturates. WIDTH spreads stereo. FEEDBACK loop. COLLAPSE gate with shaped RECOVERY.

modules.name: Mass Driver
modules.description: AF-01. 16-channel no-wave signal mixer. Per-channel GAIN + MUTE. Master DENSITY sweep, PRESSURE saturation, WIDTH stereo, FEEDBACK loop, COLLAPSE gate. 5 outputs: OUT L/R, AUX L/R, SUM.
